title: Psychosis & Schizophrenia

vignette.text: A 22-year-old college student is brought by roommates for 3 months of social withdrawal, talking to himself, and believing the government is monitoring him.

physicalExam.psychiatric: Flat affect, disorganized speech, auditory hallucinations

questions.question: Schizophrenia requires symptoms for at least?
questions.explanation: Schizophrenia requires 6 months of disturbance, with ≥1 month of active-phase symptoms (delusions, hallucinations, disorganized speech, etc.).

keyTakeaways: Negative symptoms: flat affect, avolition, alogia
